steps.title: Use the revenue clue
steps.content: The contrast says businesses typically promote themselves, but some restaurants skipped a free review-site listing associated with average revenue increases. The missing word should describe failing to make marketing as effective as possible.

steps.title: Choose the precise verb
steps.content: Choice A means decorate, which is about appearance rather than effectiveness. Choice C means approve or recommend, not improve performance. Choice D means act against, but the restaurants are neglecting an opportunity rather than undermining marketing. The answer is B.
